## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Architecture Note

- how this affects reasoning flow, control flow, or runtime behavior

## Verification

- [ ] `python scripts/qa_check.py`
- [ ] `python scripts/qa_live_check.py` if needed
- [ ] `python scripts/qa_eval_check.py` if needed
- [ ] `python scripts/quality_benchmark.py` if needed

## Risks / Caveats

- what could still be wrong
- what was intentionally deferred

## Screens / Artifacts

- screenshots, output artifacts, or benchmark notes if the change affects UI or answer quality
